title: R5 detached signature — hash-chained ledger (OPT-D primary) + SSH signature stub (OPT-B ready)

axes.design: OPT-D + OPT-B selected: OPT-D (hash-chain) requires zero key management and gives forensic detection; OPT-B (ssh-keygen -Y sign/verify) future-friendly with skip-by-default stub. OPT-A (gpg) and OPT-C (openssl Ed25519) deferred — both require key generation/management policy outside scope. Coexistence: OPT-D applies to ledger; OPT-B targets the registry blob itself.
axes.phase_1_hash_chain: Modified .githooks/pre-commit lines 60-75 to compute prev_hash = sha256(last ledger line) or 'genesis' for first entry; appended to JSONL entry. 11 lines added (PREV_HASH resolver block + format-string update with %s slot for prev_hash).
axes.phase_2_ssh_stub: tool/registry_sign.sh ~140 lines, modes sign|verify|status. Resolver: SIGNING_KEY env → git config user.signingkey → SKIPPED (rc=0). All 4 skip paths emit __REGISTRY_SIGN__ SKIPPED with reason= short-tag and fix trailer. Real ssh-keygen -Y path exists but only fires when key configured.
axes.phase_3_test: 4/4 tests PASS — (1) absent ledger → EMPTY rc=0; (2) hook fired twice on staged F999/F998, chain link verified (entry-2 prev_hash ≡ sha256(entry-1 raw line) = a5a949af…); (3) injected forged middle entry → FAIL broken_at=2, then patched line-2 prev_hash → still FAIL broken_at=3 (forward propagation); (4) SSH stub status/sign/verify all SKIPPED rc=0 with raw 66 trailers. Pristine restore confirmed (registry sha 7e40189c… ≡ baseline; ledger removed; git status delta limited to R5 files).
axes.phase_4_audit_update: SECURITY_AUDIT.md §8 appended — closes §4 item 2 'coordinated registry+baseline mutation with unsigned ledger'; confidence elevated to HIGH multi-vector forensic (preventive when OPT-B activated); 4-row test result table embedded; forgery cost analysis O(N) re-hash + write access to all chain files.

tier_1.hook_updated: .githooks/pre-commit emits prev_hash on every rotation; back-compat preserved (pre-R5 entries grandfathered by ledger_verify.sh PRE_R5 status)
tier_1.ledger_verify_shipped: tool/ledger_verify.sh — 3 modes (default/--quiet/--json), python3+sha256 walker, 4-state sentinel (PASS/FAIL/EMPTY/PRE_R5), exit 0 on PASS|EMPTY|PRE_R5, exit 1 on FAIL
tier_1.registry_sign_shipped: tool/registry_sign.sh — sign|verify|status modes, SKIP-by-default (no key), real ssh-keygen -Y sign/verify path latent until SIGNING_KEY provided, raw 66 trailers on every skip path
tier_1.security_audit_amended: design/hexa_sim/SECURITY_AUDIT.md §8 R5 update appended (~50 lines): test table, forgery cost analysis, confidence elevation, file inventory
tier_1.raw_compliance: raw 73 (minimal: 11 hook lines + 2 small tools); raw 66 (reason+fix trailers on every error path of both tools); raw 71 (REPORT-only — no commits, only tool emission + ledger writes which are first-class operations); idempotent (re-run ledger_verify produces same sentinel; SKIPPED stubs are no-ops)

fixpoint_marker: R5 OPT-D LIVE + OPT-B STUB READY — coordinated registry+baseline+ledger mutation gap closed (forensic) with O(N) forgery cost; preventive upgrade path exists via SIGNING_KEY env
ledger_state_post_test: absent (test ledger removed; pristine pre-test state)
